name: @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent
description: Coding agent CLI with read, bash, edit, write tools and session management

scripts.build: tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x dist/cli.js && bun run copy-assets
scripts.build:binary: bun run --cwd ../tui build && bun run --cwd ../ai build && bun run --cwd ../agent build && bun run build && bun build --compile ./dist/bun/cli.js --outfile dist/pi && bun run copy-binary-assets
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/modes/interactive/theme && cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/modes/interactive/theme/ && mkdir -p dist/modes/interactive/assets && cp src/modes/interactive/assets/*.png dist/modes/interactive/assets/ && mkdir -p dist/core/export-html/vendor && cp src/core/export-html/template.html src/core/export-html/template.css src/core/export-html/template.js dist/core/export-html/ && cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/core/export-html/vendor/
scripts.copy-binary-assets: cp package.json dist/ && cp README.md dist/ && cp CHANGELOG.md dist/ && mkdir -p dist/theme && cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/theme/ && mkdir -p dist/assets && cp src/modes/interactive/assets/*.png dist/assets/ && mkdir -p dist/export-html/vendor && cp src/core/export-html/template.html dist/export-html/ && cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/export-html/vendor/ && cp -r docs dist/ && cp -r examples dist/ && cp ../../node_modules/@silvia-odwyer/photon-node/photon_rs_bg.wasm dist/
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build

author: Mario Zechner
